cadence_note: Ken French refreshes the library monthly, a few weeks after month end, once the updated CRSP database lands (each CSV's first preamble line names the CRSP vintage, e.g. 'created using the 202605 CRSP database'). The exact posting day is not announced, and annual rebuilds restate history, so poll weekly rather than monthly; every run re-pulls the full corpus and overwrites, so an early poll is cheap and a late one loses nothing.
